title: heptapleurum polyandrum
intro: Heptapleurum polyandrum, also known as the lesser patha, is a type of plant that belongs to the family Araliaceae and is native to the tropical forests of India and Southeast Asia. The plant has been traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Heptapleurum polyandrum include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and treat various skin conditions. Heptapleurum polyandrum can be prepared as a herbal tea, decoction, or infusion, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
